warnings: This is the only mechanical sheet in the drawing set (M-01 of 1, per title block), covering recommended AC/ceiling-fan/exhaust-grille placement for the ground floor.

Room-to-equipment pairing for the ceiling fans and exhaust grilles (which of the two 40 CFM units goes with which 4x4 grille, exact bathroom vs hallway placement) is a best-effort reading from overlapping small labels near the ซักล้าง/ห้องน้ำ area; positions are approximate.

No cost/BTU-sizing calculation basis (e.g. room area used to size 12,000/9,000 BTU) is shown on this sheet -- it only presents the recommended equipment and location, consistent with it being a mechanical layout plan rather than a load-calculation sheet.
